name: Shrimp Ono Nui
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the flour with salt.
2. Dip the shrimp in the seasoned flour, then coat with the shredded coconut.
3. Heat oil in a deep fryer or heavy pot to 350°F (175°C).
4. Deep-fry the shrimp until golden brown and cooked through, about 3 to 4 minutes.
5. Drain on paper towels.
6. Mix the cocktail sauce with the crushed pineapple.
7. Serve the shrimp with the sauce on the side.
